title: MedFlow - Healthcare Workflow & Patient Management Platform
tags: Java • Spring Boot • Angular • PostgreSQL • REST APIs • JWT
description: Developed a healthcare management platform for streamlining patient registration, appointment scheduling, medical records management, and doctor-patient workflows. Built secure REST APIs with Spring Boot, integrated role-based authentication, and designed responsive Angular interfaces for efficient healthcare operations.

title: PlaceIT - AI Powered Placement Management System
tags: TensorFlow • Scikit-learn • Django • React • TypeScript • IEEE Publication
description: Developed an ML-based recommendation system for student-job matching using TensorFlow and Scikit-learn, integrated with Django and React for real-time placement recommendations.

title: InfraPulse - Infrastructure Monitoring & Network Diagnostics Platform
tags: Python • Flask • REST APIs • DNS • SSL Monitoring • Dashboard
description: Built a real-time infrastructure monitoring dashboard that performs DNS, SSL, latency, and connectivity diagnostics while providing actionable operational insights through an interactive web interface.

title: ShortSnips - DSA Revision & Code Snippet Platform
description: Contributed to a collaborative platform for organizing and revising Data Structures & Algorithms concepts through curated code snippets, leveraging Django APIs, React-based UI components, Neo4j graph database relationships, and cloud deployment on GCP.
